sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ طَارِقٌ أَنْ يَشْتَرِيَ هَدِيَّةً لِصَدِيقِهِ.
sentences.translation: Tariq je htio kupiti poklon za prijatelja.
sentences.translationEn: Tariq wanted to buy a gift for his friend.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى السُّوقِ وَنَظَرَ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ المَحَلَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je na pijacu i gledao u mnoge prodavnice.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the market and looked in many shops.

sentences.translation: Pronašao je odgovarajuću knjigu po razumnoj cijeni.
sentences.translationEn: He found a suitable book at a reasonable price.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعَ الثَّمَنَ وَغَلَّفَ الهَدِيَّةَ بِوَرَقٍ جَمِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Platio je cijenu i upakovao poklon u lijep papir.
sentences.translationEn: He paid the price and wrapped the gift in beautiful paper.
